message:
docs(readme): sync crate-tree LOC + pub fn counts (br-ps8bh / fd90.92)

fd90.92: line 114 was '**12 workspace crates**, 84,000+ lines of Rust,
788 public functions' but those figures are ~2x understated today.

Verified via:
  find crates -name '*.rs' -not -path '*/target/*' -not -path '*/tests/*' \
    | xargs wc -l                               → 143,355 LOC (non-test)
  find crates -name '*.rs' -not -path '*/target/*' | xargs wc -l
                                                → 167,834 LOC (incl tests)
  pub fn / pub async fn (incl indented impl methods, non-test crates)
                                                → 1,676 pub fns

Fix: 84,000+ → 140,000+ LOC (non-test, conservative); 788 → 1,600+ pub
fns. The '12 workspace crates' figure stays correct.

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -111,7 +111,7 @@ AACE is a core identity constraint, not a best-effort optimization. pandas' alig
   └────────────┘      └───────────────┘
 ```
 
-**12 workspace crates**, 84,000+ lines of Rust, 788 public functions.
+**12 workspace crates**, 140,000+ lines of Rust (non-test), 1,600+ public functions.
 
 ## Workspace Structure
